# Leonardo Lopes Almeida — Full-Stack Developer (Automation & AI)
> Personal portfolio. Full-stack: back-end (C#/.NET, Python/FastAPI, Node/TS, Java) +
> front-end (React, Next.js) + automation/RPA (Selenium, Chrome DevTools Protocol, FlaUI)
> + applied AI (Gemini, Whisper, LLMs). Based in Nova Friburgo/RJ, Brazil. English B2.

## About
- Back-end & automation developer at GoLiveTech (since May 2023).
- Information Systems student at CEFET/RJ Nova Friburgo (2019–2026 expected).
- Focus: RESTful APIs, RPA robots (web & desktop), and applied LLM tooling.
- Maintains open-source projects, including DeckTools (Steam Deck plugin, most-starred
  repo).
- Currently deepening Java via the java10x course (Spring Boot, Docker, AWS).

## Featured projects
- `Oasis da Superdotação -> https://oasisdasuperdotacao.com.br/`: Full-stack Next.js
  platform for neuropsychological assessment (courses, blog, therapy, auth).
- `Carolina Almeida (nutritionist) -> https://www.nutricarolinaalmeida.com.br/`:
  Next.js booking landing page with a validated form (Zod) and WhatsApp integration.
- `AutoMail -> https://github.com/lopesleo/AutoMail`: FastAPI + React app that
  classifies emails and drafts replies with Google Gemini.
- `DeckTools -> https://github.com/lopesleo/DeckTools`: Steam Deck (Decky Loader)
  plugin; most-starred repo.
- `Clipper -> https://github.com/lopesleo/clipper-pipeline`: Whisper + LLM auto-clip
  pipeline exporting captioned 9:16 Shorts.
- `NutriAPI -> https://github.com/lopesleo/NutriAPI`: ASP.NET Core 8 + EF Core REST API.
- `SteamFamilyZap -> https://github.com/lopesleo/SteamFamilyWppBot`: WhatsApp assistant
  with Gemini function calling + PostgreSQL.
